subject.description: Three marketing team members in simple office attire.
subject.action: Standing around a whiteboard, actively debating and crossing out 'what flopped completely'. One person is rubbing their chin in thought, another is pointing a marker at a failed test result.

setting.location: A chaotic, realistic small-office meeting room with coffee cups and scattered notes.

composition.camera_angle: Wide, candid documentary angle, slightly low.
composition.framing: Rule of thirds. MUST follow cropping rules: leave headspace above all figures, never cut in flesh, full upper bodies visible against the whiteboard.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Medium depth of field, keeping both the subjects and the scribbled whiteboard in focus.

lighting.type: Standard fluorescent office lighting combined with harsh sunlight from a window.
lighting.color_grading: Unedited, documentary-style, zero cinematic grading, raw.

aesthetic_style: RAW photo, authentic unretouched photography, shot on 35mm film, hyper realistic photorealism, actual human beings. DO NOT MAKE IT A CARTOON OR DIGITAL ART.
negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear: massive teams, more than three people, crowds, identical faces, enterprise logos, cinematic lighting, polished aesthetics, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, digital art, illustration, vector art, cartoon, 3D render, CGI.
